'''Ssiew''' was a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of the ''[[Thunderhead]]''. He fought in the [[Battle of Doornik-319]] and in the [[Battle of N'zoth]] where he died when the ''Thunderhead'' was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
